state_snapshot.overall_goal: Stabilize the Alice Viewer 2 rendering pipeline (Infinite Reversed-Z, branchless normals) by resolving OpenNURBS ingestion crashes and ensuring successful asset loading across all target meshes.
state_snapshot.active_constraints: - **3-Phase Crucible**: Phase 1 (Architectural Healing), Phase 2 (Execution/Verification), and Phase 3 (Performance/Zero-Heap) are complete. - **Zero Heap Allocations**: No heap allocations in `draw()` or camera loops; utilizes `Alice::LinearArena` (512MB) and pre-allocated `Alice::Buffer` (2M-5M vertex capacity). - **Precision & Shading**: Infinite Reversed-Z (`glClipControl`, `GL_GREATER`, `glClearDepth(0.0)`) and branchless derivative normals (`dFdx`/`dFdy`). - **CWD-Agnosticism**: Search logic probes `""`, `./build/bin/`, `../`, and `../../build/bin/`. - **Tooling**: Strict adherence to LLVM (clang-cl), Ninja, and C++17.
state_snapshot.key_knowledge: - **Crash Analysis**: The `0xC0000005` access violation was caused by dereferencing `geometryComponent->Attributes(nullptr)` without null-validation; OpenNURBS components may be valid yet attribute-less. - **Asset Matching**: Some Rhino meshes (e.g., Terrain in `CF_beta_village.3dm`) are un-named. `RhinoLoader` now defaults to the first available mesh if the search string is empty or null. - **String Robustness**: `ON_String` comparison via `_stricmp` on the `.Array()` buffer is required for reliable case-insensitive matching in the Rhino 8 OpenNURBS environment. - **Telemetry Source**: `pipeline_sweep_results.log` is the validated source of truth, confirming `[LOAD] Terrain Success`, `[LOAD] Quad Success`, and `[LOAD] OSM Success`. - **Logic Provenance**: Stable vertex extraction patterns were cloned from `include/RhinoIO.h`.
state_snapshot.artifact_trail: - `include/RhinoLoader.h`: Implemented comprehensive null-safety; added "take-first-mesh" fallback; optimized extraction loop; removed performance-degrading debug logs. - `src/sketch.cpp`: Integrated `RhinoLoader` fallback for the terrain mesh; verified and logged Z-SWP and SHD-SWP pipeline sweeps. - `src/AliceViewer.cpp`: Restored architectural purity by removing `RhinoLoader` debug headers while preserving `ON::Begin()` and `NOMINMAX` fixes. - `build_env_config.json`: Persistent configuration for the LLVM/Ninja toolchain paths.
state_snapshot.file_system_state: - **Binary**: `build/bin/AliceViewer.exe` linked and verified stable. - **Telemetry**: `pipeline_sweep_results.log` contains the full trace of successful ingestion and sweeps. - **CWD**: Root folder `C:\Users\shajay.b.ZAHA-HADID\source\repos\alice-viewer-opennurbs`.
state_snapshot.recent_actions: - Fixed the `0xC0000005` crash in the OpenNURBS ingestion loop. - Implemented name-independent mesh loading fallback for un-named assets. - Executed the full 3-phase pipeline sweep autonomously via background jobs. - Verified 100% success rate for mesh ingestion and parameter sweeps in telemetry. - Persisted system state to `snapshot_20260414_100000.xml`.
state_snapshot.task_state: 1. [DONE] Architectural Healing: GL 4.5, `ON::Begin()`, and `NOMINMAX`. 2. [DONE] CWD-Agnostic Pathing: search loop verified. 3. [DONE] Null-Safety Fix: resolved the attribute-dereference crash. 4. [DONE] Full Ingestion: confirmed loading for Terrain, Quad, and OSM meshes. 5. [IN PROGRESS] Phase 3 Handoff: Handing back for visual confirmation of Z-fighting and shading sweeps.
